title: copaiba kuntzei
intro: Copaiba kuntzei is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its resin, which contains a high concentration of beta-caryophyllene, a sesquiterpene with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Copaiba kuntzei resin has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its analgesic, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The resin can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
